name: Magicalized Duston Mop
desc: You can only control 1 "Magicalized Duston Mop". The equipped monster cannot be Tributed, or be used as a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Material for a Summon. When this card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your Graveyard: You can add 1 "Duston" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: You can only control 1 "Magicalized Duston Mop". The equipped monster cannot be Tributed, or be used as a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Material for a Summon. When this card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your Graveyard: You can add 1 "Duston" monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
